summary: Full backend + frontend E2E testing of A2A Hotel Platform. 13/13 backend tests pass. All 6 screens load correctly. Core A2A pipeline, analytics, operations working. Two issues found: Admin Panel shows no rooms (empty DB), occupancy_rate shows 400% due to mismatch between reservations table and rooms table in SQLite.

critical.issue: occupancy_rate returns 400.0% - rooms table likely has only 1 room (or very few) while reservations table has 4 confirmed, causing division by a tiny number. Formula: active_reservations / total_rooms * 100 = 4/1 * 100 = 400%

minor.issue: Returns empty rooms array - no seed data in SQLite DB for rooms. Admin Panel shows 'No rooms found'. Needs seed data or initial room setup.

Expects OAuth2 form-data (username/password), not JSON body. Frontend's LoginPage correctly uses JSON which gets adapted - works fine in UI but backend expects form-data format. Test fixed to use form-data.

integration_issues.issue: Rooms tab shows 'No rooms found' - backend DB has no rooms seeded. Reservations and Payments tabs likely also empty.

issues: Occupancy Rate shows 400% - visually misleading/incorrect data due to backend bug

action_items: Fix occupancy_rate calculation in /api/analytics/summary - add MAX(total_rooms, active_count) or ensure rooms table is seeded with at least 50 rooms
Seed SQLite hotel.db with rooms data so Admin Panel can display rooms, reservations, payments
Consider adding a seed/init script for demo data (rooms, reservations)
critical_code_review_comments: analytics.py occupancy_rate: uses 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms' but hotel.db may have 0 or very few rooms, falling back to max(1, total_rooms) which causes 400% if active > 1 room
Admin Panel rooms data empty - no initialization/seed in startup, and rooms are per-tenant, so new tenant sees empty state. Should provide seed data or 'Add Sample Rooms' button
LoginPage.jsx sends JSON body to /api/auth/login which is an OAuth2 endpoint expecting form-data - works because backend likely does dual format handling, but worth verifying

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all pages load, navigation works, A2A pipeline works, charts render - only Admin Panel has empty data issue)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - rooms DB is empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working. Login: admin@hotel.com/admin123 (OAuth2 form-data to /api/auth/login). A2A pipeline works end-to-end with live agent feed. Analytics charts render. Operations page shows static housekeeping tasks. Admin Panel empty due to no room seed data. Occupancy rate shows 400% bug in analytics summary.

occupancy_rate_400_percent.cause: analytics.py queries SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms in hotel.db (SQLite). hotel.db has 0 or 1 rooms but 4 confirmed reservations. Formula max(1, total_rooms) prevents division by zero but causes inflated % when active > total.
occupancy_rate_400_percent.fix: Seed hotel.db with rooms OR add MIN(occupancy_rate, 100.0) cap in analytics summary calculation

empty_admin_rooms.cause: Admin rooms use per-tenant SQLite DB (hotel.db). No seed data was created for the admin tenant.
empty_admin_rooms.fix: Add seed rooms in startup or create an admin endpoint to seed demo data
